name: batch_read
description: Read multiple files or line ranges in one call, with head/tail, line numbers, line counts, directory listing, show-nonprintable whitespace inspection, or unified diff between two files.

parameters.name: --repr
parameters.description: Show lines with Python repr() to reveal exact whitespace (tabs, newlines, trailing spaces)

parameters.name: --include=GLOB
parameters.description: File name glob filter for --dir mode

parameters.name: --type=f|d
parameters.description: File type filter for --dir mode: f (file) or d (directory)

parameters.name: --diff=FILE
parameters.description: Show unified diff between source file and FILE (replaces diff file1 file2 patterns)

examples.expected: Lines 10-20, 30, and 40-50 of file.go with line numbers

cost_saving_rationale: Replaces multi-step cat/nl/sed/cat-A/od-c/diff patterns with a single call, saving 2+ steps per file read operation.
